tasks.spec: Write only the answer to this question, nothing else — no punctuation, no explanation: What is the capital of France?
tasks.check: if test -s answer.md && grep -qi 'paris' answer.md; then echo 'PASS: answer.md names Paris'; echo '--- answer.md ---'; cat answer.md; else echo 'FAIL: answer.md missing or does not contain Paris'; echo '--- answer.md (if any) ---'; cat answer.md 2>/dev/null || echo '(no answer.md)'; exit 1; fi
tasks.verified: answer.md exists, is non-empty, and contains the correct answer (Paris) — proving the LangGraph lane ran local inference on llama3.2:1b and persisted a real, correct deliverable, not just that a file exists
